seoTitle: South Carnarvon vs South Datatine — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Carnarvon and South Datatine. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Carnarvon vs South Datatine: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Carnarvon and South Datatine.
heading: South Carnarvon vs South Datatine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Carnarvon, Western Australia and South Datatine, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Carnarvon has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to South Datatine (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Carnarvon or South Datatine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Carnarvon has a flood risk score of 48/100, while South Datatine scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Carnarvon scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. South Datatine scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Carnarvon or South Datatine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Carnarvon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
